skills.name: Uzumaki Naruto Combo
skills.description: Naruto's version of the Lion Combo. This skill deals 20 damage to one enemy. During 'Shadow Clones', this skill will deal 10 additional damage.

skills.name: Rasengan
skills.description: Naruto hits one enemy with a ball of chakra, dealing 45 damage to them and stunning their skills for 1 turn. Requires 'Shadow Clones'.

skills.name: Shadow Clones
skills.description: Naruto creates multiple shadow clones hiding his true self. Naruto gains 15 points of damage reduction for 5 turns. During this time, 'Uzumaki Naruto Combo' is improved and will deal an additional 10 damage and 'Rasengan' may be used.

skills.name: Sexy Technique
skills.description: This skill makes Uzumaki Naruto invulnerable for 1 turn. During 'Kyuubi's Chakra Awakening', this skill will be replaced by 'Kyuubi's Presence' and will be classed as Mental.

skills.name: Passive: Kyuubis Chakra Awakening
skills.description: When Naruto reaches 50 health for the first time, Kyuubi's chakra will awaken, healing Naruto for 5 health every turn permanently. During this time, Naruto will deal 5 additional damage and 'Shadow Clones' will grant him 15 unpierceable damage reduction instead. Passives cannot be removed.

skills.name: KO Punch
skills.description: Sakura punches one enemy with all her strength, dealing 20 damage to them and stunning their physical and mental skills for 1 turn. During 'Inner Sakura', this skill will deal 10 additional damage.

skills.name: Cure
skills.description: Using basic healing techniques, Sakura heals herself or an ally for 25 health.

skills.name: Inner Sakura
skills.description: Sakura's inner self surfaces and urges her on. For 4 turns, Sakura will gain 10 points of damage reduction. During this time, Sakura will ignore non-damage effects and 'KO Punch' will deal 10 additional damage.

skills.name: Sakura Replacement Technique
skills.description: This skill makes Haruno Sakura invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Lion Combo
skills.description: Copying a taijutsu combo that Lee used on him, Sasuke deals 30 damage to one enemy. This skill will deal an additional 15 damage to an enemy affected by 'Sharingan'.

skills.name: Chidori
skills.description: Using a lightning element attack jutsu, Sasuke deals 40 piercing damage to one enemy. This skill will deal an additional 15 damage to an enemy affected by 'Sharingan'. Requires 'Sharingan' to be active on Sasuke.

skills.name: Sharingan
skills.description: Sasuke targets one enemy. For 4 turns, Sasuke will gain 25% damage reduction and 'Chidori' may be used. During this time, that enemy will receive an additional 15 damage from 'Lion Combo' and 'Chidori'.

skills.name: Swift Block
skills.description: This skill makes Uchiha Sasuke invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Passive: Cursed Seal Awakening
skills.description: When Sasuke reaches 50 health for the first time, Cursed Seal will awaken, granting Sasuke 25% unpierceable damage reduction permanently. During this time, Sasuke's skills cannot be countered or reflected and 'Sharingan' will also make the enemy unable to reduce damage or become invulnerable.

skills.name: Dynamic Air Marking
skills.description: Akamaru sprays urine on one enemy who cannot reduce damage or become invulnerable for 3 turns. During this time, 'Double Headed Wolf' and 'Garouga' will deal 10 additional damage to them. This skill may not be used on an enemy already affected by it.

skills.name: Double Headed Wolf
skills.description: Kiba and Akamaru turn into a giant beast and attack all enemies, dealing 15 damage to them for 3 turns. The following 3 turns, 'Garouga' is improved and will cost 1 less random chakra. During this time, Kiba gains 50% unpierceable damage reduction.

skills.name: Garouga
skills.description: Kiba deals 30 damage to one enemy. During 'Double Headed Wolf', this skill is improved and will cost 1 less random chakra.

skills.name: Smoke Bomb
skills.description: This skill makes Inuzuka Kiba invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Female Bug
skills.description: Shino directs one of his female bugs to attach itself. For 4 turns, 'Chakra Leach' will deal 5 additional damage to one enemy. During this time, if that enemy uses a new harmful skill, they will deal 5 less non-affliction damage for 1 turn. This skill stacks.

skills.name: Bug Wall
skills.description: Shino calls millions of bugs to create a wall protecting himself and his allies, making the entire team invulnerable for 1 turn and granting them 10 points of permanent destructible defense.

skills.name: Chakra Leach
skills.description: Shino directs his chakra draining bugs to one enemy, dealing 15 affliction damage and stealing 1 taijutsu or genjutsu chakra from their chakra pool. The following turn (only), this skill will deal 20 affliction damage but will not steal chakra.

skills.name: Bug Clone
skills.description: This skill makes Aburame Shino invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Byakugan
skills.description: Hinata activates her Byakugan and gains 50% damage reduction for 4 turns. During this time, 'Gentle Fist' and 'Eight Trigrams 64 Palms Protection' will be improved and 'Byakugan' will reveal any invisible skills used by the enemy team. This skill cannot be countered and it ends if Hinata dies.

skills.name: Hinata Gentle Fist
skills.description: Using the Hyuuga clan's style of taijutsu, Hinata deals 20 damage to one enemy. The following turn, that enemy will be dealt 15 damage. During 'Byakugan', this skill will instantly remove 1 non-genjutsu chakra for 1 turn.

skills.name: Eight Trigrams 64 Palms Protection
skills.description: Hinata deals 10 piercing damage to all enemies for 2 turns. For 1 turn, if Hinata or her allies is affected by a new damage skill, they will become invulnerable for 1 turn*. During 'Byakugan', this skill will deal 5 additional damage.

skills.name: Hinata Block
skills.description: This skill makes Hyuuga Hinata invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Meditate
skills.description: Shikamaru sits down and begins thinking up a strategy against one enemy, marking them for 5 turns. This skill cannot be countered or reflected and may not used on an enemy already affected by it.

skills.name: Shadow Imitation
skills.description: Shikamaru captures all enemies in shadows, stunning their physical and chakra skills for 1 turn. The following turn, they will receive 5 additional damage from 'Shadow-Neck Bind'. Enemies affected by 'Meditate' will instead have their skills stunned for 2 turns.

skills.name: Shadow-Neck Bind
skills.description: Shikamaru chokes all enemies, dealing 15 affliction damage to them and making them unable to become invulnerable for 1 turn. If an enemy is affected by 'Meditate', this skill will last 2 turns instead.

skills.name: Shikamaru Hide
skills.description: This skill makes Nara Shikamaru invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Partial Double Size
skills.description: Chouji doubles the size of his arms and attacks one enemy, dealing 20 damage to them.

skills.name: Meat Tank
skills.description: Chouji transforms into a meat tank dealing 10 damage to one enemy for 2 turns. Chouji becomes invulnerable for 2 turns. Chouji cannot be healed during 'Meat Tank'.

skills.name: Akimichi Pills
skills.description: Chouji eats a pill, taking 15 affliction damage*. 'Partial Double Size' will deal 20 additional damage and 'Meat Tank' will deal 10 additional damage permanently. Each use of this skill will deal 5 more affliction damage and will cost 2 additional random chakra. Chouji can only eat three pills.

skills.name: Effortless Block
skills.description: This skill makes Akimichi Chouji invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Passive: Butterfly Mode
skills.description: When Chouji eats the three pills, he will activate the Butterfly Mode, gaining 75% unpierceable damage reduction permanently and gaining 1 random chakra every turn.

skills.name: Mind Body Disturbance
skills.description: Using this skill Ino stuns one enemy's physical and chakra skills for 1 turn. During this time, that enemy will be unable to reduce damage or become invulnerable. One random different enemy will receive 20 damage that ignores invulnerability.

skills.name: Change of Heart
skills.description: Ino takes over the mind of an enemy. For 3 turns, that enemy cannot reduce damage or become invulnerable and their harmful skills are stunned. The following 2 turns, this skill will be replaced by 'Art of the Valentine'.

skills.name: Chakra Hair Strand Trap
skills.description: Ino creates a trap for an enemy. For 1 turn, if that enemy uses a new harmful skill, then for 2 turns, 'Change of Heart' will last 1 additional turn on that enemy and 'Mind Body Disturbance' will make that enemy unable to reduce damage or become invulnerable for 2 turns instead. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Ino Block
skills.description: This skill makes Yamanaka Ino invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Art of the Valentine
skills.description: Ino deals 25 damage to one enemy. If used on an enemy affected by 'Change of Heart', this skill will deal 30 damage instead.

skills.name: Twin Rising Dragons Full Release
skills.description: Tenten releases her full potential, becoming invulnerable to non-mental damage skills for 1 turn. The following 4 turns, the initial use of 'Twin Rising Dragons' will last 3 turns instead and 'Twin Rising Dragons Trap' will stun all harmful non-mental skills for 1 turn.

skills.name: Twin Rising Dragons
skills.description: Tenten creates numerous weapons from her scroll, dealing 15 damage to all enemies for 2 turns. During this time, this skill will cost 1 taijutsu and will deal 20 damage to one enemy and 10 to all others.

skills.name: Twin Rising Dragons Trap
skills.description: Using multiple projectiles, Tenten targets all enemies, dealing 5 damage to them for each time they were damaged by 'Twin Rising Dragons'. Afterwards, all stacks are removed.

skills.name: Spiked Boulder Shield
skills.description: This skill makes Tenten invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Neji Gentle Fist
skills.description: Using the Hyuuga clan's special form of taijutsu, Neji deals 25 damage to one enemy for 2 turns. Each turn, their non-affliction damage will be reduced to a maximum of 25. The following turn, 'Eight Trigram Sixty-Four Palms' will cost 1 taijutsu and 1 random chakra.

skills.name: Eight Trigram Heavenly Spin
skills.description: Neji becomes invulnerable for 1 turn while dealing 15 damage to all enemies. The following turn, 'Eight Trigram Sixty-Four Palms' will cost 1 bloodline and 1 random chakra.

skills.name: Eight Trigram Sixty-Four Palms
skills.description: Neji closes all of one enemy's chakra nodes, dealing 35 piercing damage to them and removing 1 taijutsu or ninjutsu chakra from them for 2 turns.

skills.name: Neji Byakugan
skills.description: This skill makes Hyuuga Neji invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: High Speed Taijutsu
skills.description: Lee attacks one enemy with amazing speed, dealing 25 piercing damage to them.

skills.name: Front Lotus
skills.description: Lee launches an enemy into the air and slams them down with a great force, dealing 35 piercing damage to that enemy. This skill will be replaced by 'Final Lotus' for 1 turn.

skills.name: Fifth Gate Opening
skills.description: Lee opens five of his chakra gates. Permanently, 'High Speed Taijutsu' and 'Front Lotus' may be used. During this time, Lee will deal 5 additional damage each time he is damaged by a skill. This skill will be replaced by 'Fiery Spirit'.

skills.name: Evasion
skills.description: This skill makes Rock Lee invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Fiery Spirit
skills.description: Lee hypes himself up, pushing himself to fight harder, gaining 1 taijutsu chakra and healing 10 health and an additional 10 health for each 25 health Lee has lost.

skills.name: Final Lotus
skills.description: Lee uses his strongets ability, expending all his chakra and dealing 50 piercing damage to one enemy. Afterwards, Lee takes 5 affliction damage*. This skill cannot be countered.

skills.name: Desert Graveyard
skills.description: Gaara crushes one enemy with sand, that enemy will be dealt 50 affliction damage and all 'Desert Coffin' stacks will be removed from them. This skill cannot be countered.

skills.name: Desert Coffin
skills.description: Gaara surrounds one enemy with a pile of sand, stunning their non-mental skills for 1 turn. Permanently, that enemy will receive 25 additional damage from 'Desert Graveyard'. This skill stacks.

skills.name: Third Eye
skills.description: Gaara connects the third eye with his optic nerve using chakra. For 1 turn, any enemy that uses a new harmful skill will grant Gaara 15 permanent destructible defense; Any enemy that uses a new helpful skill will grant Gaara 1 random chakra. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Sand Shield
skills.description: This skill makes Gaara of the Desert invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Black Secret Machine One Shot
skills.description: Kankuro uses two of his puppets to trap and stab one enemy who takes 25 damage. During 'Puppet Preparation' this skill will deal an additional 5 damage.

skills.name: Puppet Preparation
skills.description: Kankuro prepares his puppets for combat, gaining 10 permanent destructible defense. The following 3 turns, 'Poison Bomb' may be used and 'Black Secret Machine One Shot' will be improved.

skills.name: Poison Bomb
skills.description: One of Kankuro's puppets creates a cloud of smoke, dealing 10 affliction damage to all enemies for 3 turns.

skills.name: Puppet Replacement Technique
skills.description: This skill makes Kankuro invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Cutting Whirlwind
skills.description: Temari creates a razor sharp wind, dealing 20 piercing damage to one enemy. For 1 turn, Temari becomes invulnerable to non-mental skills. This skill cannot be countered.

skills.name: Dust Wind
skills.description: Temari kicks up dust, making her team invulnerable for 1 turn. Also for 1 turn, all enemies will deal 50% less non-affliction damage; This effect will last 1 additional turn to an enemy for each time 'Cutting Whirlwind' was used on them, removing all stacks afterwards.

skills.name: Summoning Quick Beheading Dance
skills.description: Temari summons the wind weasel Kamatari in the battlefield, dealing 35 damage to all enemies. This skill will deal 10 additional damage to an enemy for each time 'Cutting Whirlwind' was used on them, removing all stacks afterwards.

skills.name: Fan Defence Technique
skills.description: This skill makes Temari invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Melody Arm Tuning
skills.description: Dosu fine-tunes his Melody Arm to produce debilitating sound vibrations. The following 4 turns, 'Vibrating Sound Drill' and 'Sound Manipulation' are improved and will deal double damage.

skills.name: Vibrating Sound Drill
skills.description: Dosu attacks with his drill, dealing 20 damage to one enemy. For 1 turn, If that enemy uses a new skill, then for 1 turn they will be unable to reduce damage or become invulnerable. The following 4 turns, 'Sound Manipulation' will be improved on that enemy.

skills.name: Sound Manipulation
skills.description: Kinuta Dosu deals 10 affliction damage to one enemy. For 1 turn, this enemy will receive 10 additional damage from non-affliction skills and will deal 10 less non-affliction damage. This skill non-damage effects will last 1 additional turn if used on an enemy affected by 'Vibrating Sound Drill'.

skills.name: Dosu Replacement Technique
skills.description: This skill makes Dosu Kinuta invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Illusion Bell Needles
skills.description: One enemy takes 15 damage. If used one turn after 'Needle and Bell Trap', that enemy will also lose 20% of their current health and cannot be healed for 1 turn.* If used one turn after 'Unnerving Bells', this skill will deal 25 additional damage.

skills.name: Needle and Bell Trap
skills.description: One enemy cannot reduce damage or become invulnerable for 2 turns. If used one turn after 'Unnerving Bells', that enemy will also have their skills stunned for 1 turn. If used one turn after 'Illusion Bell Needles', that enemy will also take 10 affliction damage.

skills.name: Unnerving Bells
skills.description: One enemy loses 1 non-taijutsu chakra. If used one turn after 'Needle and Bell Trap', that enemy will also take 50% more damage from physical skills for 2 turns.* If used one turn after 'Illusion Bell Needles', that enemy will also take 50% more damage from chakra skills for 2 turns.*

skills.name: Sharp Analysis
skills.description: This skill makes Tsuchi Kin invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Air Cutter
skills.description: Using his surgically altered arms Zaku fires a blast of supersonic air at one enemy who takes 25 damage. The following turn, 'Extreme Air Cutter' may be used.

skills.name: Wall of Air
skills.description: Zaku alters his air wave to protect one ally for 1 turn. The first harmful non-mental skill used on this ally will be countered. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Extreme Air Cutter
skills.description: Zaku boosts his air waves to a frightening level and deals 45 damage to all enemies. This skill requires 'Air Cutter' to be used in the previous turn.

skills.name: Zaku Replacement Technique
skills.description: This skill makes Zaku Abumi invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Water Needles
skills.description: Haku flings a number of water based needles, dealing 30 piercing damage to one enemy. This skill will deal an additional 10 damage to that enemy if they are stunned. While improved, this skill will deal 40 piercing damage to the target instead.

skills.name: Acupuncture
skills.description: Haku hits the acupuncture points of one enemy, stunning their skills for 1 turn. While improved, this skill will last 2 turns instead. This skill ignores invulnerability.

skills.name: Demonic Ice Mirrors
skills.description: Haku creates numerous mirrors, dealing 10 damage to all enemies for 3 turns. The following 3 turns, 'Water Needles' and 'Acupuncture' will be improved. During this time, Haku gains 30 points of destructible defense and ignores all non-damage effects.

skills.name: Mirror Transfer
skills.description: This skill makes Haku invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: White Fang Slash
skills.description: Using his sword, Young Kakashi deals 20 piercing damage to one enemy. For 1 turn, that enemy will deal 5 less non-affliction damage. The following turn, Young Kakashi will deal 5 additional damage with his skills.

skills.name: Amateur Raikiri
skills.description: Using a weaker form of his signature jutsu, Young Kakashi deals 25 piercing damage to one enemy. For 1 turn, that enemy will deal 5 less non-affliction damage. The following turn, Young Kakashi will deal 5 additional damage with his skills.

skills.name: Implanted Sharingan
skills.description: If used on an ally, the first non-unique skill used by them will be copied and will cost 1 bloodline and 1 random chakra for 1 turn. If used on an enemy, for 1 turn the first skill used by them that: deals damage will increase Kakashi's damage by 10; stuns will make Kakashi's skills stun for 1 turn; drains chakra will grant Kakashi 1 random chakra. Invisible on enemies.

skills.name: Sword Parry
skills.description: This skill makes Young Kakashi invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Piercing Stab
skills.description: Finding an opening in his enemy's defense, Obito quickly stabs them, dealing 15 damage to the enemy. During 'Obito Sharingan', this skill deals 25 piercing damage ignoring counters and reflects.

skills.name: Obito Goukakyuu no Jutsu
skills.description: Obito breaths searing fire on one enemy dealing 15 affliction damage to them for 2 turns. During 'Obito Sharigan', this skill will deal 30 affliction damage instantly and will have no cooldown.

skills.name: Obito Sharingan
skills.description: Obito activates his sharingan, gaining 15 points of damage reduction for 4 turns. During this time, if any of Obito's allies use a new skill, the cost of their harmful skills will be decreased by 1 random chakra for 1 turn. This skill cannot trigger twice in a row on the same ally. This skill ends if Obito dies.

skills.name: Sparkling Parry
skills.description: This skill makes Uchiha Obito invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Pit Trap
skills.description: Rin traps one enemy. For 1 turn, Rin will gain 50% damage reduction, and that enemy will take 20 piercing damage at the end of their turn. If that enemy uses a new skill, they will take 10 piercing damage and will receive 10 additional damage from melee skills. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Healing Touch
skills.description: Rin heals an ally for 25 health and removes all harmful affliction skills from them.

skills.name: Medical Kit
skills.description: Rin gives her medical kit to herself or an ally, healing them 10 health for 3 turns. During this time, any healing skills used by the target of 'Medical Kit' will be increased 10 points.

skills.name: Flee
skills.description: This skill makes Nohara Rin invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Hanabi Gentle Fist
skills.description: Hanabi deals 20 damage to one enemy for 1 turn, and 10 damage the following turn. For 1 turn, if that enemy uses a new non-chakra skill, they will lose 1 non-genjutsu chakra.

skills.name: Hanabi Kaiten
skills.description: Hanabi spins at one enemy, dealing 20 damage to them for 1 turn, and 10 damage the following turn. For 1 turn, if that enemy uses a new non-physical skill, their skills will be stunned for 1 turn.

skills.name: Unyielding Tenacity
skills.description: Hanabi fights to the bitter end. For 2 turns, Hanabi will be unable to be killed and will ignore all stun effects. During this time, 'Hanabi Gentle Fist' and 'Hanabi Kaiten' will cost 1 random chakra and Hanabi will deal 5 additional damage.

skills.name: Byakugan Insight
skills.description: This skill makes Hyuuga Hanabi invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Chain Wrap
skills.description: Demon Brothers wrap one enemy. The following 3 turns, if Demon Brothers uses a new harmful skill on that enemy, their non-mental skills will be stunned for 1 turn. During this time, Demon Brothers becomes invulnerable to ranged skills, ignores stun effects and this skill is replaced by 'Chain Shred'.

skills.name: Bladed Gauntlet
skills.description: Demon Brothers uses their gauntlets shredding, gaining 10 permanent destructible defense and dealing 30 damage to one enemy. This skill will deal an additional 5 damage to the enemy affected by 'Chain Wrap'.

skills.name: Puddle Illusion
skills.description: The Demon Brothers hide in water, gaining 20 points of destructible defense and 1 taijutsu chakra.

skills.name: Demon Brothers Vanish
skills.description: This skill makes Demon Brothers invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Chain Shred
skills.description: Demon Brothers rip apart one enemy affected by 'Chain Wrap', dealing 45 piercing damage to them.

skills.name: Hidden Mist Technique
skills.description: Zabuza creates a dense fog. For 2 turns, all enemies will have their physical and mental skills cost 1 additional random chakra. This effect cannot be ignored. The following 2 turns, Zabuza gains 25% damage reduction and 'Silent Homicide' will be improved. This skill ignores invulnerability.

skills.name: Silent Homicide Technique
skills.description: Using an advanced assasination technique, Zabuza deals 30 piercing damage to one enemy. During 'Hidden Mist Technique', this skill will be improved and will deal 45 piercing damage to one enemy which ignores invulnerability.

skills.name: Great Waterfall Technique
skills.description: Zabuza knocks all enemies down with a giant wave of water, dealing 10 damage to them and stunning their physical and ranged skills for 1 turn.

skills.name: Water Clone Zabuza
skills.description: This skill makes Momochi Zabuza invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Haze Clones
skills.description: Oboro creates illusionary duplicates of himself. The following 3 turns, 'Exploding Kunai' and 'Underground Ambush' will be improved. During this time, Oboro gains 10 points of destructible defense and becomes invulnerable to mental skills.

skills.name: Underground Ambush
skills.description: Hiding in the ground, Oboro waits and then attacks one enemy from behind dealing 20 damage and stunning their physical and mental skills for 1 turn. During 'Haze Clones', this skill is improved and targets all enemies instead.

skills.name: Exploding Kunai
skills.description: Oboro throws a kunai with an exploding tag on it dealing 15 damage to all enemies. During 'Haze Clones', this skill is improved and deals 20 damage.

skills.name: Fleet of Foot
skills.description: This skill makes Oboro invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Needle Barrage
skills.description: Shigure specifically directs needles at one enemy dealing 25 damage to them. This skill can only target enemies that are affected by 'Sprinkling Needles'.

skills.name: Umbrella Toss
skills.description: Shigure tosses some of his umbrellas into the air. For 4 turns, Shigure gains 10 points of damage reduction and 'Sprinkling Needles' may be used.

skills.name: Sprinkling Needles
skills.description: Shigure causes many needles to rain down from his umbrellas dealing 13 piercing damage to all enemies for 3 turns. During this time, 'Needle Barrage' may be used on enemies affected by this skill. This skill cannot be countered and it requires 'Umbrella Toss' to be used.

skills.name: Umbrella Block
skills.description: This skill makes Shigure invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Nirvana Fist Style
skills.description: Jiroubou deals 30 damage to one enemy.

skills.name: Earth Seal Mud Cannonball
skills.description: Jiroubou deals 20 damage to all enemies.

skills.name: Dungeon Chamber of Nothingness
skills.description: For 3 turns, Jiroubou will steal 1 non-ninjutsu chakra from one enemy. During this time, Jiroubou's team will gain 35 destructible defense. This skill will end if Jiroubou or one of his allies loses their destructible defense.

skills.name: Earth Wall Land Flip
skills.description: This skill makes Jiroubou invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Summoning: Kyodaigumo
skills.description: Kidoumaru summons Kyodaigumo who creates a massive amount of small spiders, dealing 10 affliction damage to all enemies for 5 turns. Kidoumaru gains 10 points of damage reduction for 5 turns.

skills.name: Spider Web
skills.description: Kidoumaru uses spider web on himself or an ally. For 1 turn, all enemies that use a new melee skill on that ally will be countered and will have their physical and melee skills stunned for 2 turns.

skills.name: Golden Arrow
skills.description: Kidoumaru fires a special arrow made of enzymes from his mouth at one enemy dealing 50 piercing damage.

skills.name: Golden Armor
skills.description: This skill makes Kidoumaru invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Rest
skills.description: Ukon rests within the body of Sakon, healing him for 30 health. This skill will end 'Parasite Demon Technique' if it's currently active.

skills.name: Gattling Punch
skills.description: Using one body, Sakon and Ukon rapidly punch one enemy, dealing 40 damage to them. During 'Parasite Demon Technique', this skill will deal 20 damage and will cost 1 taijutsu only.

skills.name: Parasite Demon Technique
skills.description: Sakon and Ukon deals 15 affliction damage to one enemy permanently.* During this time, Sakon gains 30% damage reduction and 'Gattling Punch' will deal 20 less damage. This skill will end if the affected enemy dies. This skill cannot be used while it's active.

skills.name: Summoning: Rashoumon
skills.description: This skill makes Sakon invulnerable for 1 turn. This skill will end 'Parasite Demon Technique' if it's currently active.

skills.name: Doki Demons
skills.description: Tayuya summons the Doki Demons, dealing 15 piercing damage to all enemies for 2 turns. Tayuya gains 10 points of damage reduction for 2 turns. The following turn, 'Doki Ghosts' will be improved and will remove chakra from the enemy.

skills.name: Doki Ghosts
skills.description: Tayuya deals 15 affliction damage to one enemy. If 'Doki Demons' is used on the last turn, this skill will also remove 1 ninjutsu or genjutsu chakra. If 'Demonic Flute Illusion' is used on the last turn, this skill will also stun physical and chakra skills for 1 turn.

skills.name: Demonic Flute Illusion
skills.description: Playing a genjutsu melody on her flute, Tayuya stuns all enemies' harmful skills for 1 turn. The following turn, 'Doki Ghosts' will be improved and will stun the enemy's physical and chakra skills for 1 turn.

skills.name: Tayuya Insight
skills.description: This skill makes Tayuya invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Dance of the Camellia
skills.description: Kimimaro uses his superior taijutsu and arm bones as a sword dealing 30 damage to one enemy. This skill cannot be countered or reflected. Afterwards, Kimimaro will receive 5 affliction damage.*

skills.name: Dance of the Clematis
skills.description: Kimimaro attacks one enemy with an extremely hard and sharp bone spear, dealing 40 damage to them and stunning them for 1 turn. This skill cannot be countered or reflected. Afterwards, Kimimaro will receive 10 affliction damage.

skills.name: Dance of the Seedling Fern
skills.description: Kimimaro creates a forest of sharp bones, dealing 30 damage to all enemies and reducing all enemy physical and chakra non-affliction damage by 20 for 1 turn. This skill cannot be countered or reflected. Afterwards, Kimimaro will receive 15 affliction damage for 2 turns.*

skills.name: Bone Defense
skills.description: This skill makes Kimimaro invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Kunai Assault
skills.description: Throwing many kunais, Mizuki deals 15 damage to one enemy. The following turn, this skill will have no cost. This skill ignores invulnerability.

skills.name: Shuriken Execution
skills.description: Mizuki throws a giant shuriken, dealing 35 piercing damage to one enemy. This skill may only target enemies at or below 50 health. 'Shuriken Execution' will deal 10 less damage permanently each time it is used. This skill ignores invulnerability.

skills.name: Genjutsu Ambush
skills.description: Mizuki uses his ambush tactics with genjutsu. The following 3 turns, if Mizuki uses a new harmful skill, he will become invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Mizuki Dodge
skills.description: This skill makes Touji Mizuki invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Shield Ally
skills.description: Iruka uses his own body to shield one ally. For 1 turn, that ally will ignore all damage dealt to them. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Shuriken Throw
skills.description: Iruka throws a couple shurikens at one enemy who takes 20 piercing damage. This skill will deal an additional 10 damage for each 30 health Iruka has lost.

skills.name: Sealed Bombs Square Formation
skills.description: Iruka creates a trap with a set of exploding seals. The following 2 turns, one enemy will take 60% more damage from melee skills. During this time, if that enemy use a new skill, they will take 20 piercing damage and this skill will end.

skills.name: Iruka Replacement Technique
skills.description: This skill makes Umino Iruka invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Chakra and Life Absorption
skills.description: Yoroi endows his attacks. The following 3 turns, 'Draining Assault' and 'Energy Drain' may be used.

skills.name: Draining Assault
skills.description: Yoroi charges at one enemy with multiple energy drains, stealing 12 health from them for 3 turns and 1 bloodline or ninjutsu chakra each turn. During this time, 'Energy Drain' will make the enemy's skills cost 1 additional random chakra. Requires 'Chakra and Life Absorption' to be used.

skills.name: Energy Drain
skills.description: Yoroi touches one enemy, stealing 20 health from them for 1 turn and lowering their non-affliction damage by 5 until that enemy uses a new skill that deals damage. During 'Draining Assault', this skill will be improved. Requires 'Chakra and Life Absorption' to be used.

skills.name: Yoroi Replacement Technique
skills.description: This skill makes Akadou Yoroi invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Flexible Twisting Joints
skills.description: Using his distractingly loose joints, Misumi targets an ally or an enemy. If used on an enemy he will deal 15 damage that ignores invulnerability to them. If used on an ally, that ally will gain 15 points of damage reduction for 1 turn.

skills.name: Soft Physique Modification
skills.description: Misumi wraps around one enemy. For 2 turns all new harmful skills used on Misumi will be reflected to that enemy instead. During this time, that enemy will be unable to reduce damage or become invulnerable.

skills.name: Tighten Joints
skills.description: Misumi tightens his joints gaining 15 destructible defense. If 'Soft Physique Modification' is active, the enemy that it is active on will also receive 20 damage and will be stunned for 1 turn.

skills.name: Misumi Block
skills.description: This skill makes Tsurugi Misumi invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Dual Pin
skills.description: Anko deals 5 affliction damage to one enemy permanently. Until that enemy is killed, they will receive an additional 5 damage from all Anko's other skills. During this time, this skill will be replaced by 'Dragon Fire'.

skills.name: Twin Snakes
skills.description: Anko delivers a large dose of poison, dealing 15 affliction damage to one random enemy. For 1 turn, Anko becomes invulnerable to physical skills. The following turn, Anko's skills will cost 1 less random chakra.

skills.name: Hidden Shadow Snake Hand
skills.description: Anko calls forth snakes from under her jacket which slam into one enemy, dealing 20 damage and 15 affliction damage to them. Afterwards, Anko gains 5 permanent destructible defense.

skills.name: Quick Reflexes
skills.description: This skill makes Mitarashi Anko invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Dragon Fire
skills.description: Anko scorches the battlefield with fire, dealing 10 affliction damage to all enemies for 2 turns. During this time, they will also receive an additional 5 affliction damage from all other affliction skills.

skills.name: Prepared Needle Shot
skills.description: Shizune shoots hidden needles at one enemy dealing 15 piercing damage to them. For 1 turn, if that enemy uses a new harmful skill, they will receive 50% more damage from any skill for 1 turn.

skills.name: Poison Mist
skills.description: Shizune breaths a poison cloud on one enemy who takes 12 affliction damage for 3 turns. This skill may not be used on an enemy currently affected.

skills.name: Healing Resuscitation Regeneration
skills.description: Using this advanced healing technique, Shizune heals one ally for 35 health and removes all enemy affliction skills from them.

skills.name: Shizune Replacement Technique
skills.description: This skill makes Shizune invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Mystical Palm Technique
skills.description: Kabuto cuts one enemy through their flesh like a scalpel, dealing 20 piercing damage to them. For 2 turns, that enemy will take 5 additional damage from non-mental melee skills. During this time, their harmful physical and chakra skills will cost 1 additional random chakra.

skills.name: Temple of Nirvana
skills.description: Kabuto creates a large scale genjutsu that affects all enemies for 1 turn. Any enemy that uses a new skill will have their chakra and ranged skills stunned and will receive 5 additional damage from 'Mystical Palm Technique' permanently. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Secret Healing Wound Destruction
skills.description: Kabuto removes all enemy affliction skills from himself, gains 50% damage reduction for 1 turn and heals 35 health. This skill will heal 5 less health each time it is used.

skills.name: Dead Soul Technique
skills.description: This skill makes Yakushi Kabuto invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Sharingan Copy
skills.description: For 1 turn, any new non-unique skill that targets Kakashi will instantly be reflected back upon the enemy who used it. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Nin-Dogs
skills.description: Kakashi summons the nin-dogs which bite an enemy. That enemy has their physical and mental skills stunned for 1 turn. During this time 'Raikiri' will do 50 more damage to that enemy.

skills.name: Raikiri
skills.description: An attack so strong it is said to cut lightning. This skill deals 50 piercing damage to one enemy. If the enemy is affected by 'Nin-Dogs' the enemy will take 100 piercing damage from 'Raikiri' instead.

skills.name: Kakashi Replacement Technique
skills.description: This skill makes Hatake Kakashi invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Cherry Blossom Suffocation
skills.description: Kurenai suffocates all enemies with illusionary cherry blossoms, dealing 10 damage to them for 3 turns. During this time, if 'Plant-Form Attack' is used on an enemy affected by this skill, they will be stunned for 1 turn.

skills.name: Plant Form Attack
skills.description: Kurenai deals 20 damage to one enemy. For 2 turns, that enemy will be unable to reduce damage or become invulnerable; This effect is applied before the damage. If used on an enemy affected by 'Cherry Blossom Suffocation', their physical and ranged skills will be stunned for 1 turn.

skills.name: Tree Bind Death
skills.description: Kurenai protects herself or an ally for 1 turn. The first non-affliction damaging skill used on that ally will be countered. The countered enemy will have their chakra and melee skills stunned and will receive double damage from mental skills for 3 turns. Invisible. Ends when Kurenai dies.

skills.name: Vanishing Illusion
skills.description: This skill makes Yuhi Kurenai invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Flying Swallow
skills.description: Using blades with wind chakra, Asuma and his allies gain 10 points of damage reduction and all enemies take 10 damage for 3 turns.

skills.name: Finishing Blow
skills.description: Asuma deals 35 damage to one enemy. During the second turn of 'Flying Swallow', this skill will stun physical and ranged skills for 1 turn. During the third turn of 'Flying Swallow', this skill will deal 5 additional damage and will remove 1 taijutsu or bloodline chakra.

skills.name: Self Sacrifice
skills.description: Sarutobi Asuma protects one ally from harm. For 1 turn, that ally will become invulnerable to harmful skills.

skills.name: Wind Chakra Blades Block
skills.description: This skill makes Sarutobi Asuma invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Strong Whirlwind
skills.description: Gai kicks with a strong whirlwind, dealing 30 piercing damage to one enemy. During 'Sixth Gate Opening' this skill will be improved and will deal 60 piercing damage.

skills.name: Sixth Gate Opening
skills.description: Gai opens six chakra gates, losing 40% of his current health. The following 2 turns, 'Strong Whirlwind' will be improved and will deal 60 piercing damage. During this time, Gai will become invulnerable.

skills.name: Counter Punch
skills.description: Gai singles out one enemy to counter attack. If that enemy uses a new harmful skill, they will be countered and will receive 30 damage. This skill is invisible. This skill is classed as Action and may be interrupted.

skills.name: Gai Replacement Technique
skills.description: This skill makes Maito Gai invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Hiraishin no Jutsu
skills.description: Minato deals 25 piercing damage to one enemy and gains 75% unpierceable damage reduction for 1 turn. All enemies marked by 'Hiraishin Marking' will take 15 piercing damage. All allies marked by 'Hiraishin Marking' will become invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Hiraishin Marking
skills.description: If used on an enemy, that enemy will be unable to become invulnerable. If used on an ally, that ally gains 5 points of damage reduction. This skill lasts 3 turns, ignores invulnerability and cannot be used on the same target the following turn.

skills.name: Hiraishin Kunai Scatter
skills.description: By scattering hiraishin kunais, Minato applies 'Hiraishin Marking' on all enemies and all allies for 1 turn. Afterwards, Minato gains 1 random chakra. This skill is invisible and ignores invulnerability.

skills.name: Seal Sensing
skills.description: This skill makes Namikaze Minato invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Four Symbols Seal
skills.description: Kushina attempts to seal an enemy away, destroying their destructible defense, dealing 15 piercing damage to them, stunning their skills for 1 turn, removing 1 bloodline or genjutsu chakra from them and permanently lowering the non-affliction damage they deal by 5.

skills.name: Life Link
skills.description: For 4 turns if either Kushina or onw enemy diea, the other will die as well. The following 4 turns, this skill will be replaced by 'Life Transfer'. This skill ignores invulnerability and cannot be countered, reflected, ignored, removed or interact with other skills.

skills.name: Adamantine Sealing Chains
skills.description: Kushina uses an immensely powerful seal, surrounding one enemy with chains, first removing all helpful skills on them and then stunning them and making them invulnerable to all further skills for 2 turns. This skill ignores invulnerability and cannot be countered or reflected.

skills.name: Adamantine Covering Chains
skills.description: This skill makes Uzumaki Kushina invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Life Transfer
skills.description: Kushina heals an ally for 25 points and deals 25 damage to herself.

skills.name: Eavesdrop
skills.description: For 1 turn, the first harmful non-mental skill used on Hayate will be countered. This skill is invisible the first turn. Permanently, 'Dance of the Crescent Moon' will deal 10 additional damage when this skill is used. This skill stacks.

skills.name: Dance of the Crescent Moon
skills.description: Using both his sword and genjutsu, Hayate becomes invulnerable for 1 turn and deals 30 damage to one enemy. Afterwards, all the additional damage from 'Eavesdrop' and 'Crescent Moon Slash' will be removed and converted into permanent damage reduction, in percentage.

skills.name: Crescent Moon Slash
skills.description: Hayate jumps on an enemy from above, dealing 20 piercing damage to them. Permanently, 'Dance of the Crescent Moon' will deal 10 additional damage when this skill is used. This skill stacks.

skills.name: Determined Retreat
skills.description: This skill makes Gekko Hayate invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Wind Blade
skills.description: Baki conjures a maelstrom of blade-like wind and does 40 piercing damage to one enemy.

skills.name: Sudden Strike
skills.description: A simple, blindingly fast attack leaving an illusionary trail to throw off enemies. Baki does 20 piercing damage to one enemy.

skills.name: Flak Jacket
skills.description: Baki puts on a specialized flak jacket from the sand village on himself, or one ally granting that character 50 destructible defense for 4 turns. During this time, that character will ignore all harmful effects except damage until this defense is destroyed.

skills.name: Baki Teleportation
skills.description: This skill makes Baki invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Kusanagi
skills.description: Orochimaru pulls the legendary sword Kusanagi and stabs one enemy, dealing 30 damage to them and removing 1 bloodline or genjutsu chakra from that enemy.

skills.name: Cursed Seal Technique
skills.description: Orochimaru places a cursed seal on an ally or an enemy, dealing 15 affliction damage to them and granting them 1 random chakra.

skills.name: Major Summoning: Manda
skills.description: By summoning Manda in the battlefield, Orochimaru deals 45 damage to one enemy and that enemy will lose 1 bloodline, ninjutsu and genjutsu from their pool.

skills.name: Earth Clone Technique
skills.description: This skill makes Orochimaru invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Toad Mouth Bind
skills.description: By placing every character into a giant toad mouth, Jiraiya grants his team 20% damage reduction for 2 turns. During this time, all enemies will receive 25% more damage.

skills.name: Major Summoning: Gamabunta
skills.description: Jiraiya summons Gamabunta in the battlefield, dealing 35 damage to all enemies. If targetable, Jiraiya will become invulnerable for 1 turn and will gain 1 random chakra. This skill cannot be countered.

skills.name: Great Fireball Technique
skills.description: Jiraiya spits a giant fireball at all enemies, dealing 20 affliction damage to one enemy and 10 affliction damage to all other enemies.

skills.name: Spiked Buddha
skills.description: This skill makes Jiraiya invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Major Summoning: Katsuyu
skills.description: Tsunade sunmons the slug queen Katsuyu, granting her team 50% damage reduction for 2 turns and healing them 20 health instantly. Katsuyu also spits acid in all enemies dealing 20 affliction damage to them.

skills.name: Painful Sky Leg
skills.description: Tsunade performs a drop kick with her insane strength, dealing 30 piercing damage to one enemy and stunning their physical and mental skills for 1 turn.

skills.name: Creation Rebirth
skills.description: Using stored chakra Tsunade regenerates herself, healing 35 health instantly.

skills.name: Tsunade Replacement Technique
skills.description: This skill makes Tsunade invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Fire Dragon Flame Missile
skills.description: Sandaime Hokage deals 25 damage to one enemy. This enemy also takes 15 affliction damage the following turn.*

skills.name: Major Summoning Enma
skills.description: By summoning Enma, Sandaime and all allies gain 25% damage reduction and cannot be killed by enemies for 2 turns*. If targetable, Sandaime will do 15 damage to all enemies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Shiki Fuujin
skills.description: The death god sucks the life out of one enemy who takes 35 affliction damage, is stunned and cannot reduce damage or become invulnerable every turn.* Sandaime himself takes 20 affliction damage and is stunned every turn. This skill cannot be removed or ignored, may only target one enemy and is cancelled when Sandaime dies.

skills.name: Earth Release Wall
skills.description: This skill makes Sandaime Hokage invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Birth of the Trees
skills.description: Hashirama summons a giant field of trees. For 3 turns, any enemy that uses a new harmful skill will have the cost of their harmful skills increased by 1 random and their cooldowns increased by 1 for 1 turn. The following 3 turns, if Hashirama uses a new skill his team will gain 5 destructible defense.

skills.name: Tree Strangulation
skills.description: Hashirama catches and crushes one enemy in giant tree branches, dealing 25 piercing damage to that enemy and stunning their physical and chakra skills for 1 turn. During 'Birth of the Trees', this skill will cost 1 less random chakra.

skills.name: Branch Manipulation
skills.description: Hashirama sends out his trees in all directions, dealing 10 affliction damage to all enemies and granting 25% damage reduction to himself and his allies. During 'Birth of the Trees', this skill will have no cooldown.

skills.name: Deflection
skills.description: This skill makes Shodai Hokage invulnerable for 1 turn. This skill will not grant destructible defense during 'Birth of the Trees'.

skills.name: Bringer of Darkness
skills.description: Tobirama plunges the battlefield into total darkness. For 1 turn, Tobirama and his allies will become invulnerable to physical and mental skills.

skills.name: Water Collision Destruction
skills.description: Summoning a giant wave of water, Tobirama deals 10 damage to all enemies for 3 turns. Each turn, all enemies will have all their skills subclassed as Affliction stunned. The following 3 turns, 'Water Assault' will deal 10 additional damage.

skills.name: Water Assault
skills.description: Nidaime encases one enemy in water, making them ignore all helpful effects for 1 turn and dealing 20 damage to them.

skills.name: Water Encampment Wall
skills.description: This skill makes Nidaime Hokage invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Hiraishin Rasengan
skills.description: Yondaime Hokage deals 40 damage to one enemy ignoring invulnerability that cannot be countered or reflected. The following turn, this skill will cost 1 ninjutsu chakra and will deal 35 damage instead.

skills.name: Space Time Barrier
skills.description: Using his space-time abilities, Yondaime Hokage targets one ally or himself. For 1 turn, all new non-mental skills used on that ally will be reflected onto the enemy. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Dead Demon Consuming Seal
skills.description: Using a partial seal, Yondaime seals part of one enemy away. That enemy will lose 30% of their health and have their physical and ranged skills stunned for 1 turn. If that enemy's health falls to 10 or lower that enemy will be killed. Yondaime Hokage will take 10 affliction damage*.

skills.name: Kunai Defense
skills.description: This skill makes Yondaime Hokage invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Sand Mastery
skills.description: Using sand to both defend and attack, Gaara gains 5 permanent destructible defense. Permanently, Gaara's skills will cost 1 less random chakra.

skills.name: Desert Imperial Funeral
skills.description: Gaara deals 25 piercing damage to one enemy. For 1 turn, that enemy will be unable to reduce damage or become invulnerable and their skills will cost 1 additional random chakra. If that enemy is affected by 'Quicksand Waterfall', their skills will cost 2 additional random chakra instead.

skills.name: Quicksand Waterfall
skills.description: Gaara creates massive waves of sand. For 4 turns, Gaara and his allies gain 10 destructible defense and all enemies take 10 damage*. During this time, if Gaara or an ally receives new non-affliction damage, they will gain 5 destructible defense the following turn.

skills.name: Shield of Shukaku
skills.description: Gaara uses the ultimately hard absolute defense, creating a protective shield in front of his team and granting them 20 points of destructible defense for 3 turns.

skills.name: Drunken Fist
skills.description: Lee charges at an enemy and hits them with a knockout blow, dealing 30 damage to that enemy, and for 1 turn, their skills will deal 100% less damage.

skills.name: Unpredictable Assault
skills.description: Using his drunken master abilities, Lee deals 20 damage to one enemy. For 1 turn, if that enemy uses a new harmful skill, Lee will instantly heal 10 health. This skill cannot be countered.

skills.name: Drunken Counter
skills.description: Lee targets himself or an ally. For 1 turn, the first harmful physical skill used on that ally will be countered. If successfully, the countered enemy will have 'Unpredictable Assault' used on them.

skills.name: Drunken Leap
skills.description: This skill makes Drunken Lee invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Curse Seal: Tiger
skills.description: By drinking a curse seal potion, Mizuki transforms into a wild tiger. The following 3 turns, Mizuki will gain 35 points of destructible defense and during this time, 'Curse Seal: Tiger Punch' will be improved and 'Puppets Genjutsu' will be replaced by its alternate version.

skills.name: Curse Seal: Tiger Punch
skills.description: Mizuki fiercely punches one enemy, dealing 30 damage to them. For 2 turns, that enemy's skills will deal 10 less damage. During 'Curse Seal: Tiger', this skill is improved and will deal 45 damage instead. This skill does not stack.

skills.name: Puppets Genjutsu
skills.description: Mizuki puts an enemy under a genjutsu. For 2 turns, that enemy will be unable to reduce damage or become invulnerable, and their skills will deal 5 less damage and will cost 1 additional random chakra. During this time, if that enemy does not use a new skill, they will take 10 damage.

skills.name: Evil Intentions
skills.description: This skill makes Touji Mizuki invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Curse Seal: Tiger Bomb
skills.description: Mizuki charges like a bomb, dealing 45 damage to one enemy and becoming invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Kyuubi Chakra
skills.description: Unknowingly using the Kyuubi Chakra, Naruto gains 50% damage reduction* and heals 15 health each turn for 3 turns. During this time, 'Kyuubi Rasengan' will be worsened.* This skill will cancel 'Kyuubi Rage' when used.

skills.name: Kyuubi Rage
skills.description: Using the vile Kyuubi chakra surrounding him, Kyuubi Naruto deals 10 damage to all enemies for 3 turns. During this time, 'Kyuubi Rasengan' will be improved*. This skill will cancel 'Kyuubi Chakra' when used.

skills.name: Kyuubi Rasengan
skills.description: Kyuubi Naruto deals 40 damage to one enemy and stuns their non-mental skills. Kyuubi Naruto takes 10 affliction damage*. During 'Kyuubi Rage', this skill will deal 50 damage. During 'Kyuubi Chakra', this skill will deal 30 damage.

skills.name: Chakra Howl
skills.description: This skill makes Kyuubi Naruto invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Corrupt Chidori
skills.description: Using a cursed seal chakra corrupted Chidori Sasuke does 45 piercing damage to one enemy and for 2 turns, will reduce their non-affliction damage by 20.

skills.name: Katon: Goukakyuu no Jutsu
skills.description: Sasuke launches a giant fireball, dealing 20 affliction damage to one enemy. For 1 turn, If that enemy uses a skill they will take 10 affliction damage. During 'Cursed Seal', this skill will be improved and will also deal an additional 10 damage.

skills.name: Cursed Seal: Claw Wings
skills.description: Sasuke taps into the Cursed Seal, growing claw wings from his back. Sasuke takes 20 affliction damage* and becomes invulnerable for 1 turn. The following turn, 'Corrupt Chidori' will cost 1 random chakra and 'Katon: Goukakyuu no Jutsu' will have no cost. This skill will be replaced by 'Dark Void' for 1 turn.

skills.name: Sharingan Evasion
skills.description: This skill makes Cursed Seal Sasuke invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Dark Void
skills.description: Expunging the corrupt chakra, Sasuke engulfs one enemy, stunning them for 2 turns, and making them invulnerable to all skills. When this skill ends, that enemy will receive 55 damage. This skill will end if Sasuke dies.

skills.name: Sand Claw
skills.description: Gaara attacks with a claw of concentrated sand, dealing 30 damage to one enemy and gaining 10 destructible defense.

skills.name: Constricting Sand Prison
skills.description: Gaara traps an enemy with sand, dealing 10 damage to them each turn. During this time, the first skill that enemy uses will be countered and this skill will end.

skills.name: Sand Transformation
skills.description: Each turn, for 5 turns, Gaara will gain 10 destructible defense. When this skill ends, Gaara will transform into the Shukaku for 3 turns, reducing the cost of 'Sand Claw' by 1 random and replacing 'Constricting Sand Prison' and 'Sand Transformation'.

skills.name: Thick Sand Coat
skills.description: This skill makes Shukaku Gaara invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Drilling Air Bullet
skills.description: Sending forth a powerful ball of wind, Gaara deals 60 damage to one enemy.

skills.name: True Awakening
skills.description: Gaara truly lets Shukaku awaken from inside him, letting it take over. The Following turn, 'Sand Claw' and 'Drilling Air Bullet' will deal double damage.

skills.name: Samehada Slash
skills.description: Using his sword, Samehada, Kisame slashes one enemy who takes 20 damage and stunning their physical or chakra skills for 1 turn.

skills.name: Samehada Shred
skills.description: Kisame unwraps Samehada and shreds one enemy. For 2 turns that enemy takes 15 damage and one bloodline or genjutsu chakra is stolen from their pool.

skills.name: Water Shark Projectile
skills.description: Using a stream of compressed water Kisame does 20 damage to one enemy and stuns their chakra or ranged skills for 1 turn.

skills.name: Kisame Replacement Technique
skills.description: This skill makes Hoshigaki Kisame invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Mangekyou Sharingan
skills.description: Itachi activates his Mangekyou Sharingan. For 2 turns, Itachi will become invulnerable to physical and chakra damage skills.

skills.name: Tsukuyomi
skills.description: Itachi mentally tortures one enemy for 3 days in a matter of seconds stunning their harmful skills for 3 turns.

skills.name: Amaterasu
skills.description: Itachi deals 14 affliction damage to one enemy every turn permanently. This skill will end if Itachi dies or if the skill is used on a different enemy. This skill does not stack.

skills.name: Sharingan Insight
skills.description: This skill makes Uchiha Itachi invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Strange Jutsu
skills.description: Masked Man isolates himself and one enemy from the battlefield, *making them both invulnerable to every characters except each other for 3 turns; This effect cannot be ignored. During this time, that enemy will take 15 piercing damage each turn.

skills.name: Chain Assault
skills.description: Producing chains from his wrists, Masked Man gains 10 destructible defense for 1 turn and deals 25 damage to one enemy, reducing their non-affliction damage by 10 for 1 turn. This skill deals 35 damage and reduces 15  points of damage to the enemy affected by 'Strange Jutsu'.

skills.name: Summoning: Kyuubi
skills.description: Masked Man may summons Kyuubi if he has 50 health or less, granting himself 55 points of destructible defense permanent. While he has this destructible defense, all of his skills will be replaced by 'Summoned Kyuubi: Bijuudama'.

skills.name: Masked Man Block
skills.description: This skill makes Masked Man invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Summoned Kyuubi: Bijuudama
skills.description: Kyuubi gathers a massive sphere of chakra and fires it at all enemies dealing 35 piercing damage to them.

skills.name: Oodama Rasengan
skills.description: Naruto uses a greater version of Rasengan, dealing 40 piercing damage to one enemy ignoring invulnerability. During 'Kyuubi Boost', this skill will stun that enemy's non-mental skills for 1 turn. Afterwards, Naruto takes 5 affliction damage*. During 'Passive: Three Tails Release', this skill will be replaced.

skills.name: Shadow Clones: Rasengan
skills.description: The following turn, Naruto will deal 20 piercing damage to one enemy and make them unable to reduce damage or become invulnerable for 1 turn. During this time, Naruto will ignore all harmful effects. During 'Passive: Three Tails Release', this skill will be replaced. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Kyuubi Boost
skills.description: Naruto gains 1 Ninjutsu chakra, loses 10 health and for 4 turns gains 25% unpierceable damage reduction, ignores stuns and this skill becomes 'Kyuubi Empowered Rasengan'. Cannot be used during 'Passive: Three Tails Transformation'.

skills.name: Shadow Clone Save
skills.description: This skill makes Uzumaki Naruto (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Kyuubi Empowered Rasengan
skills.description: Naruto uses a Rasengan empowered by the Kyuubi chakra, dealing 25 damage to one enemy and stunning their non-mental skills for 1 turn.

skills.name: Passive: Three Tails Release
skills.description: Each time Naruto uses 'Oodama Rasengan', 'Kyuubi Empowered Rasengan' or 'Kyuubi Boost', he will gain 1 Kyuubi Rage stack. At 4 Kyuubi Rage stacks, kyuubi chakra will be released for 3 turns, removing all harmful skills, granting 50% unpierceable damage reduction, ignoring stun effects and improving his skills.

skills.name: Three-Tail: Claw Smash
skills.description: Naruto dashes forward and strikes one enemy with a powerful smash, dealing 40 piercing damage and stunning their non-mental for 1 turn. Afterwards, Naruto takes 5 affliction damage. This skill ignores invulnerability.

skills.name: Three-Tail: Chakra Shockwave
skills.description: The following turn, Naruto will deal 20 affliction damage to all enemies. During this time, Naruto will ignore all harmful effects. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Chakra Enhanced Punch
skills.description: Enhancing her attack with finely controlled chakra, Sakura breaks one enemy's destructible defense and deals 25 piercing damage to them. This skill will be replaced by 'Blossom's Fury'.

skills.name: Trained Healing
skills.description: Using her trained healing skills, Sakura heals an ally for 20 health for 2 turns. Each turn, that ally will have all affliction skills removed from them.

skills.name: Self Heal
skills.description: Sakura targets herself permanently, healing 20 health instantly the first time she is damaged by a skill. This skill is invisible and ends when triggered.

skills.name: Insightful Dodge
skills.description: This skill makes Haruno Sakura (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Blossoms Fury
skills.description: Sakura releases a ground breaking punch, destroying one enemy's destructible defense and dealing 35 piercing damage to them. This skill cannot be reflected and returns to 'Chakra Enhanced Punch' once it's used.

skills.name: Great Beast Painting: Lions
skills.description: Sai creates a number of ink lions to attack one enemy dealing 30 damage to them, and for 1 turn, Sai will gain 15 points of destructible defense.

skills.name: Great Beast Painting: Snake
skills.description: Sai creates a snake made of ink to trap one enemy. stunning their physical and chakra skills for 1 turn. During this time, that enemy will be unable to reduce damage or become invulnerable. This skill ignores invulnerability.

skills.name: Adaptive Painting
skills.description: For 3 turns, any ally that is stunned will become invulnerable for 1 turn; Any ally that has chakra removed/stolen will gain 1 random chakra; Any enemy that damages Sai or his allies will increase Sai's damage by 10 for 1 turn. The following 3 turns, 'Great Beast Painting: Snake' will be replaced.

skills.name: Ink Clone
skills.description: This skill makes Sai (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Great Beast Painting: Bird
skills.description: Sai creates a giant ink bird that crashes to one enemy, dealing 25 damage to them and stunning their physical and chakra skills for 1 turn.

skills.name: Jutsu Imitation
skills.description: Kakashi imitates one enemy's jutsu, copying a random offensive skill from them. The copied skill will have its cost changed to random chakras and will be replacing this skill for 3 turns. This skill cannot copy skills that require a preparation.

skills.name: Kakashi Mangekyou
skills.description: By using his newly developed Mangekyou Sharingan, Kakashi warps space and time dealing 45 piercing damage to one enemy and increasing their cooldowns by 1 turn for 2 turns. This skill cannot be countered, reflected and ignores invulnerability.

skills.name: Team Tactics
skills.description: For 1 turn, Kakashi and all his allies will ignore enemy stun effects. The following turn all their skills will cost 1 less random chakra.

skills.name: Bunshin Stand-in
skills.description: This skill makes Hatake Kakashi (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Sanctuary Enlightenment Enclosing Palm
skills.description: Yamato uses an ancient technique that seals one enemy's power, dealing 30 piercing damage to them. For 1 turn, that enemy will ignore all effects that improve their skills and will be unable to become invulnerable by enemies's skills.

skills.name: Four Column Prison
skills.description: Yamato creates a barrier of wood around one enemy or ally. If used on an enemy, that enemy will have their non-mental skills stunned and will become invulnerable to helpful skills for 2 turns. If used on an ally, that ally will gain 40 destructible defense. This skill ignores invulnerability.

skills.name: Wood Clone
skills.description: Yamato protects one ally or himself with a clone of wood for 1 turn, countering the first physical or chakra skill used against them. The countered enemy will take 20 damage* and the protected ally will gain 20 destructible defense. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Wood Locking Wall
skills.description: This skill makes Yamato (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Leaf Rising Wind
skills.description: Lee tries to hinder an enemy, dealing 15 damage to them and lowering all their damage by 10 for 2 turns. This skill will deal an additional 10 damage, and the damage reduction effect will last 1 additional turn for each ally that is dead.

skills.name: Leaf Great Whirlwind
skills.description: Lee gains momentum, dealing 20 damage to one enemy and gaining 10 points of damage reduction for 1 turn. The following turn this skill will deal an additional 10 damage and grant 10 more damage reduction. This skill will deal an additional 10 damage for every ally that has been killed.

skills.name: Maximum Force Blast
skills.description: Mixing the power of his gates, his allies and everything Lee fights for, he unleashes a powerful attack at one enemy dealing 20 damage to them. This skill will deal an additional 20 damage for each ally that is dead, and an additional 20 damage for each 30 health that Lee has lost.

skills.name: Jumping Dodge
skills.description: This skill makes Rock Lee (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Eight Trigams Sky Palm
skills.description: Neji deals 20 damage to one enemy. For 1 turn, if that enemy uses any new skill, they will lose 1 non-taijutsu chakra.

skills.name: Mountain Crusher Palm
skills.description: Neji destroys all enemy destructible defense and deals them 30 damage to them, and then removes them 1 taijutsu and 1 genjutsu chakra. For 2 turns, 'Eight Trigams Sky Palm' will deal 10 additional damage to that enemy.

skills.name: Reactive Rotation
skills.description: Neji target himself or one ally for 1 turn. The first harmful non-mental skill used on the protected character will be countered, and for 3 turns will take 10 additional damage from Neji's skills. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Neji Insight
skills.description: This skill makes Hyuuga Neji (S) character invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Weapon Upgrade
skills.description: By upgrading her weapons, Tenten gains 10 points of destructible defense for 1 turn. The following turn, 'Kunai Grenade' will deal an additional 5 damage, and 'Heavenly Chain Disaster' will cost 1 less random chakra. This skill will be replaced by 'Explosive Kunais Wave' for 1 turn.

skills.name: Kunai Grenade
skills.description: Tenten throws an explosive filled with kunais at the enemy team, dealing 15 damage to one enemy and 10 damage to all other enemies. Any enemy that falls to 35 health or below will also receive 5 affliction damage*.

skills.name: Heavenly Chain Disaster
skills.description: Tenten rains blindingly fast projectiles upon the battlefield, dealing 30 piercing damage to all enemies.

skills.name: Leaping Dodge
skills.description: This skill makes Tenten (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Explosive Kunais Wave
skills.description: Tenten throws a wave of kunais with explosive tag on the enemy team, dealing 10 affliction damage to them. The following 3 turns, these enemies will be dealt 5 affliction damage each turn.

skills.name: Gai Nunchaku Style
skills.description: Gai deals 10 damage to one enemy for 3 turns. Whenever an enemy uses a new physical or melee skill on him, they will take 15 damage*. During this time, the target of this skill will receive 10 additional damage from 'Reactive Taijutsu Rampage'.

skills.name: Gate Release
skills.description: Gai release one gate per turn, gaining 10% of an unpierceable damage reduction and 5 additional damage each turn for 6 turns. During this time, he will take 5 affliction damage and cannot be healed.This skill becomes 'Asakuujaku' permanently.

skills.name: Reactive Taijutsu Rampage
skills.description: Gai deals 25 damage to one enemy. This skill cannot be countered or reflected.

skills.name: Muscle Block
skills.description: This skill makes Might Gai (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Asakuujaku
skills.description: Gai deals 15 piercing damage and 10 affliction damage to one enemy and stuns their skills. This skill cannot be countered or reflected.

skills.name: Mega Palm Thrusts
skills.description: Expanding his arms for more inertia, Chouji deals 30 piercing damage to one enemy and stuns their physical and melee skills for 1 turn.

skills.name: Spiked Meat Tank
skills.description: If used on an enemy: That enemy will be dealt 25 damage and Chouji becomes invulnerable for 1 turn. If used on himself or an ally: For 1 turn, all non-mental skills used on that ally will be countered and any countered enemy will be dealt 25 damage*.

skills.name: Expansion Technique
skills.description: Chouji grows gigantic, gaining 45 destructible defense for 3 turns. The following 3 turns, 'Mega Palm Thrusts' will target all enemies and 'Spiked Meat Tank' will target all enemies or will target all allies if used on an ally.

skills.name: Chouji Leap
skills.description: This skill makes Akimichi Chouji (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Shadow Sewing
skills.description: Shikamaru sends several tendrils of shadow to one enemy, dealing 35 damage to them and stunning their physical and chakra skills for 1 turn. Afterwards, this skill will be replaced by 'Shadow Sewing - Hold' for 1 turn.

skills.name: Long-Range Tactics
skills.description: Shikamaru goes long. For 4 turns, each time Shikamaru uses a new harmful skill, he will become invulnerable for 1 turn. If Shikamaru receives new non-affliction damage, this skill will be ignored for 1 turn. The following 4 turns, this skill will be replaced by 'Final Explosion'.

skills.name: Expert Analysis
skills.description: By carefully analyzing one enemy, Shikamaru figures out their weakness. For 3 turns, any time that enemy uses a new skill that enemy will be unable to become invulnerable or reduce damage and all helpful counter and reflect skills on them will be ignored for 1 turn. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Panicked Dodge
skills.description: This skill makes Nara Shikamaru (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Shadow Sewing - Hold
skills.description: Shikamaru continues to maintain his technique, stunning the physical and chakra skills of the enemy affected by 'Shadow Sewing' or this skill for 1 turn and dealing 20 damage to them. After that, this skill remains active on the enemy.

skills.name: Final Explosion
skills.description: Using his shadow technique, his analysis and his range, Shikamaru traps one enemy in a pit, and blows them up. One enemy affected by 'Shadow Sewing' or 'Shadow Sewing - Hold' and 'Expert Analysis' while Shikamaru is invulnerable through 'Long-Range Tactics' will receive 100 damage.

skills.name: Rudimentary Healing
skills.description: Using her healing skills, Ino heals an ally for 20 health. If Ino has used a new skill on the last turn, this skill will heal 5 additional health instead.

skills.name: Proxy Surveillance
skills.description: Ino predicts one enemy's move. For 1 turn, if this character uses a new harmful skill, it will be delayed by 1 turn. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Mind Body Switch
skills.description: Ino forces her mind into one enemy, dealing 25 piercing damage to them and ending any harmful skill activated by that enemy. For 1 turn, that enemy's harmful skills will deal 10 less non-affliction damage and their helpful skills will cost 1 additional random chakra. This skill ignores invulnerability.

skills.name: Hide
skills.description: This skill makes Yamanaka Ino(s) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Thousand-Armed Murder
skills.description: Asuma gains 40 destructible defense and instantly deals 25 damage to one enemy. During this time, he can use this skill again for 1 random to deal 20 damage to one enemy. When this skill ends, Asuma will be unable to use this skill for 1 turn.

skills.name: Ash Pile Burning
skills.description: Asuma breaths out a cloud of combustible ash to all enemies each turn, increasing the cooldowns of their skills by 1 turn. During this time, this skill will be replaced by 'Ash Pile Burning - Ignite'.

skills.name: Decapitate
skills.description: Showing no mercy, Asuma targets one enemy, and if that enemy's health is 25 or less, he will instantly kill that enemy. This skill ignores invulnerability and cannot be countered or reflected.

skills.name: Asuma Evasion
skills.description: This skill makes Sarutobi Asuma (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Ash Pile Burning - Ignite
skills.description: Asuma lights up the ash on the battlefield, dealing 10 affliction damage to all enemies for each stack of 'Ash Pile Cloud' on them. This skill will end 'Ash Pile Cloud' and it cannot be countered or reflected and ignores invulnerability.

skills.name: Gentle Step Twin Lions Fist
skills.description: Hinata creates two chakra lions and attacks an enemy, dealing 30 piercing damage to them and removing 1 random chakra from them. The following turn, 'Pressure Point Closure' will stun their non-mental skills for 1 turn.

skills.name: Eight Trigrams Thirty Two Palms
skills.description: Hinata uses a lesser form of eight trigram sixty four palms, dealing 30 piercing damage to one enemy and stunning their non-mental skills for 1 turn. The following turn, 'Pressure Point Closure' will remove 1 random chakra.

skills.name: Pressure Point Closure
skills.description: Hinata closes an enemy's pressure point, dealing 20 damage to them.

skills.name: Byakugan Sight
skills.description: This skill makes Hyuuga Hinata (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Insect Swarm
skills.description: Shino sends out wave of his insect army at one enemy, dealing 15 affliction damage to them for 3 turns. The following 3 turns, that enemy will be invulnerable to all friendly skills each turn and during this time this skill will be replaced by 'Insect Consumption'.

skills.name: Insect Barricade
skills.description: The following turn, the first new harmful skill used on himself or one ally will be countered, 'Parasitic Giant Beetle Infestation' will be placed on the countered enemy and then activated. If this skill does not counter an enemy, Shino will gain 1 Bloodline chakra. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Parasitic Giant Beetle Infestation
skills.description: Shino infects one enemy with a small bug. 3 turns after this skill has been used, the bug bursts out, dealing 30 affliction damage to them and activating all other copies of this skill on that enemy. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Insect Cocoon
skills.description: This skill makes Aburame Shino (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Insect Consumption
skills.description: Shino commands his insects to drain the chakra of one enemy affected by 'Insect Swarm' stealing 1 random chakra from them and increasing the damage that enemy receives from 'Insect Swarm' by 5 that turn.

skills.name: Man Beast Clone
skills.description: Kiba grant himself and one ally 5 damage reduction. If Kiba use a new harmful skill, that ally gains 10 destructible defense for 1 turn. If that ally uses a new harmful skill, Kiba gains 5 additional damage for 1 turn; Doesn't stack. Becomes 'Enhanced Garouga', cannot be removed.

skills.name: Piercing Fang
skills.description: Kiba deals 20 piercing damage to one enemy. For 1 turn, Kiba will ignore stun effects and his other skills will cost 1 random chakra less.

skills.name: Fang Over Fang
skills.description: Kiba deals 20 damage to all enemies this turn and for 2 turns Kiba will deal 5 more damage on them.

skills.name: Hide in the Shade
skills.description: This skill makes Inuzuka Kiba (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Enhanced Garouga
skills.description: Kiba deals 30 piercing damage to one enemy and stuns all other enemies harmful skills for 1 turn.

skills.name: Crow Assault
skills.description: Aoba deals 5 damage to all enemies for 4 turns. During this time, all Aoba team will gain 5 damage reduction points. This skill deals an additional 10 damage on enemies affected by 'Chakra Imbued Kunai'.

skills.name: Crow Convergence
skills.description: Aoba first makes one enemy unable to reduce damage or become invulnerable and deals them 30 damage. The following 3 turns, that enemy will take 5 additional mental damage. This skill deals 15 additional damage on enemies affected by 'Chakra Imbued Kunai'.

skills.name: Chakra Imbued Kunai
skills.description: Aoba targets one enemy for 2 turns. If a new skill that has counter, reflect or invulnerability is used on that enemy, they will will ignore helpful effects for 1 turn. This skill is invisible and ends when triggered.

skills.name: Crow Smoke Screen
skills.description: This skill makes Yamashiro Aoba invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Mace Crush
skills.description: Kotetsu summons a giant mace and slams it against one enemy, dealing 30 damage to them. This skill will deal 10 more damage if the enemy has been stunned by the 'Starch Syrup Capturing Field.'.

skills.name: Starch Syrup Capturing Field
skills.description: Izumo Spits out a field of sticky skyrup making it harder for the enemy team to move around. For 2 turns, any enemy that uses a new non-mental skill, including Affliction as a separated class, will have that specif class of skill stunned for 1 turn.

skills.name: Devastate
skills.description: Izumo moves to hit an enemy from the left. For the next 3 turns, if 'Annihilate' is used on that target, they will take 65 damage.

skills.name: Tag Team
skills.description: Izumo swap, exchanging his health points for Kotetsu's. If Izumo or Kotetsu is killed during this time, the other will take permanent control. During this period, 'Devastate' will be replaced by 'Annihilate.' This skill can be used again to exchange health points. This skill cannot be ignored or removed.

skills.name: Annihilate
skills.description: Kotetsu moves to hit an enemy from the right. For the next 3 turns, if 'Devastate' is used on that target, they will take 65 damage.

skills.name: Summon Kuromaru
skills.description: Tsume calls Kuromaru to aid her. The following 4 turns, she will gain 50% points of damage reduction. During this time, this skill will be replaced by 'Fierce Bite' and any enemy that uses a new harmful non-affliction skill on Tsume will receive 10 damage.

skills.name: Passing Fang
skills.description: Tsume spins, dealing 15 piercing damage to one enemy for 2 turns. All stun skills that enemy uses will also be decreased by 2 turns. If 'Summon Kuromaru' is active, this skill will deal 5 additional damage.

skills.name: Flashbang
skills.description: Tsume covers herself and her allies, making them invulnerable to all non-affliction skills for 1 turn. Tsume only carries 3 of these grenades with her at all times, so this skill can only be used three times in a game.

skills.name: Man-Beast Defense
skills.description: This skill makes Inuzuka Tsume (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Fierce Bite
skills.description: Kuromaru jumps at one enemy dealing 25 damage which ignores invulnerability. If that enemy dies this turn, then for 2 turns Tsume will have her damage increased by 10, will ignore all stun effects and cannot be killed.

skills.name: Mental Barrier
skills.description: Inoichi (S) puts up his Mental Barrier. For 2 turns one enemy's skills will cost 1 additional random chakra and Inoichi will be invulnerable to ranged skills. During this time Inoichi (S) will gain 25% damage reduction and Telepathy will be improved.

skills.name: Mind Probe
