skills.description: Shino creates a massive barrier of bugs to defend his team. For 1 turn, Shino and his allies will heal 15 health and will gain 15 points of destructible defense.

skills.name: Hidden Insects
skills.description: This skill makes Shinobi Alliance Shino (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Sixty-Four Palms
skills.description: Hinata delivers a series of attacks to one enemy, dealing 10 affliction damage to them and removing all stacks of 'Byakugan: Enhanced Vision' from them. During 'Byakugan: Enhanced Vision', if the target uses a new harmful skill, 'Chakra Lion Attack' will be applied on them.

skills.name: Gentle Step Twin Lion Fists
skills.description: Hinata creates 2 lions. The next 2 times any enemy uses a new harmful skill, 'Chakra Lion Attack' will be applied on them dealing 30 damage instead and Hinata will lose 1 lion. During 'Byakugan: Enhanced Vision' this skill will create 3 lions. This skill cannot be used while active and will end if Hinata is killed.

skills.name: Byakugan: Enhanced Vision
skills.description: Hinata takes advantage of her Byakugan and its enhanced vision, improving her skills for 3 turns. During this time, any enemy that uses a new harmful skill will receive 5 additional damage from 'Sixty-Four Palms' permanently. This skill cannot be countered and it ends if Hinata is killed.

skills.name: Byakugan: Focus
skills.description: This skill makes Shinobi Alliance Hinata (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Chakra Lion Attack
skills.description: The target of this skill will recelve 20 damage and will lose 1 non-bloodline chakra. If this skill is triggered by 'Gentle Step Twin Lion Fists', the target will be dealt 30 damage instead.

skills.name: Tornado Fang
skills.description: Kiba deals 30 piercing damage to one enemy and makes them deal 10 less non-affliction damage for 1 turn. During 'Three Headed Wolf' this skill deal 10 additional damage.

skills.name: Three Headed Wolf
skills.description: Kiba removes all physical and chakra harmful skills on his team, and for 3 turns, targets all enemies. During this time, the enemies that use a new harmful skill will take 5 piercing damage and will receive 5 additional damage from physical melee skills permanently. This skill is replaced by 'Tail Rotating Fang'.

skills.name: Man Animal Tatics
skills.description: Kiba and one ally will deal 5 additional damage from non-affliction skills for 2 turns. During this time, everytime a new enemy harmful skill is used on them, their skills will cost one random chakra less for 1 turn.

skills.name: Kiba Block
skills.description: This skill makes Shinobi War Kiba (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Tail Rotating Fang
skills.description: Kiba deals 45 piercing damage to one enemy and becomes invulnerable to physical skills. Permanently, both Kiba and that enemy will deal 5 less physical damage.

skills.name: Sand Binding Prison
skills.description: Gaara deals 30 piercing damage to one enemy and stuns their non-mental skills for 1 turn. During 'Desert Layered Imperial Funeral Seal', this skill will deal 10 additional damage. During 'Mother's Absolute Defense', this skill's stunning effect will last 1 additional turn.

skills.name: Desert Layered Imperial Funeral Seal
skills.description: Gaara deals 15 piercing damage to all enemies. For 2 turns, any enemy that uses a new harmful skill will be dealt 5 piercing damage. This skill ends if 'Mother's Absolute Defense' is used.

skills.name: Mothers Absolute Defense
skills.description: Gaara grants his team 15 permanent destructible defense. For 2 turns, if Gaara or an ally is targeted by a new harmful skill, they will gain 5 permanent destructible defense. This skill ends if 'Desert Layered Imperial Funeral Seal' is used.

skills.name: Sand Wall
skills.description: This skill makes Shinobi Alliance Gaara (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Third Moon Unleash
skills.description: Temari unleashes her fan with all three moons revealed. For 4 turns, Temari's skilLs will cost 1 less random chakra. During this time, any enemy that uses a new skill on Temari will receive 5 additional damage from her permanently.

skills.name: Temari Air Slash
skills.description: Temari sweeps her fan to create a slicing current of wind. For 1 turn, Temari becomes invulnerable to non-mental skills, deals 15 piercing damage to one enemy and stuns their skills. The following turn, that enemy will be dealt 15 damage.

skills.name: Summoning: Kamatari
skills.description: Summoning Kamatari, Temari deals 40 piercing damage to one enemy. After used, if the target of this skill is killed, Temari gains 1 random chakra.

skills.name: Fan Heavy Block
skills.description: This skill makes Shinobi Alliance Temari (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Kankuro: Puppet Mastery
skills.description: Kankuro prepares his puppets, gaining 25 unpierceable damage reduction. If Kankuro is targeted by a new harmful non-affliction damaging skill, he will lose 5 points of damage reduction from this skill. If used while active, it will be re-aplied.

skills.name: Puppet Manipulation: Sasori
skills.description: Kankuro targets all enemies, dealing damage to them equal the amount of damage reduction points that 'Kankuro: Puppet Mastery' currently has. If 'Kankuro: Puppet Mastery' has 15 points of damage reduction or less, this skill will cost 1 less random chakra.

skills.name: Puppet Manipulation: Father and Mother
skills.description: Kankuro protects himself or an ally, granting them 10 destructible defense for each 5 points of damage reduction that 'Kankuro: Puppet Mastery' currently has. If 'Kankuro: Puppet Mastery' has 15 points of damage reduction or less, this skill will cost 1 less random chakra.

skills.name: Kankuro Sealing Technique
skills.description: This skill makes Shinobi Alliance Kankuro (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Katsu!
skills.description: Deidara detonates all his bombs creating a great explosion, first becoming invulnerable for 1 turn and after dealing 5 piercing damage to all enemies. Afterwards, all stacks from Deidara's skills will be removed. This skill cannot be countered.

skills.name: Bat Bombs
skills.description: Deidara deals 10 affliction damage to all enemies. Permanently, 'Katsu!' will deal 5 additional damage to them. For 1 turn, any enemy that uses a new skill will receive 15 additional damage instead from 'Katsu!'. The following turn, 'Jellyfish Explosives' will deal 5 additional damage.

skills.name: Jellyfish Explosives
skills.description: Deidara deals 20 piercing damage to one enemy. Permanently, 'Katsu!' will deal 10 additional damage to that enemy. For 1 turn, any enemy that uses a new skill will permanently receive 10 additional damage from 'Katsu!'. The following turn, 'Bat Bombs' will deal 5 additional damage.

skills.name: Chakra Clay Trap
skills.description: Deidara creates a trap to one enemy. For 1 turn, if that enemy uses a new harmful skill they will be countered and will take 20 piercing damage. Permanently, the countered enemy will receive 10 additional damage from 'Katsu!'. The target of this skill is invisible.

skills.name: Scorch Release
skills.description: Pakura deals 20 affliction damage to one enemy and makes them unable to be healed for 1 turn.

skills.name: Searing Combat
skills.description: Pakura deals 5 affliction damage to all enemies for 3 turns. During this time, all enemies that use a new harmful skill will *take 5 affliction damage and 'Scorch Release' will deal 10 additional damage on them.

skills.name: Steaming Murder
skills.description: Pakura deals 35 affliction damage to one enemy and stuns their helpful skills. The following turn, all other Pakura's harmful skills will cost random chakras instead.

skills.name: Experienced Defense
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Pakura (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Chakra Threads
skills.description: Sasori manipulates his puppets, gaining 20 points of destructible defense for 3 turns. During this time, 'Puppet Manipulation' deals 5 additional damage and 'Chakra Threads: Puppet Trap' will reflect all harmful skills instead.

skills.name: Puppet Manipulation
skills.description: Edo Tensei Sasori deals 15 damage to one enemy. For 1 turn, that enemy will deal 10 less non-affliction damage. If the health of that enemy drops to 35 or below, their physical and chakra skills will be stunned for 1 turn.

skills.name: Chakra Threads: Puppet Trap
skills.description: Edo Tensei Sasori targets one ally for 1 turn. The first harmful skill used on that ally will be reflected upon the enemy. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Falling Guard
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Sasori (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Silent Piercing Murder
skills.description: Haku deals 20 piercing damage to one enemy for 2 turns. For 1 turn, that enemy will lose 1 bloodline or ninjutsu chakra.

skills.name: Cristal Ice Mirrors Execution
skills.description: Haku deals 20 damage to one enemy. For 1 turn, if this enemy uses a new harmful non-mental skill, that skill will be reflected onto another random enemy. If no skill is reflected, Haku will steal 1 bloodline chakra from that enemy.

skills.name: Low Temperature Enhancement
skills.description: Haku grants himself 15 destructible defense for 2 turns. The following 2 turns, he will deal 5 additional damage and each turn that he does not use a new skill, he will gain 1 random chakra.

skills.name: ET Haku Block
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Haku (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Demon Shroud
skills.description: Zabuza emantes shroud putting pressure in the battlefield. For 1 turn, all enemies will have the cost of their harmful skills increased by 1 random chakra. Afterwards, any enemy affected by this skill will receive 5 additional damage from Zabuza's skills permanently. This effect stacks.

skills.name: Executioner Strike
skills.description: Zabuza executes one enemy dealing 20 piercing damage to them. For 1 turn, that enemy's skills will have 1 additional cooldown.

skills.name: Executioner Blade Absorption
skills.description: Zabuza steals 10 health from one enemy and for 1 turn, that enemy's harmful skills will cost 1 additional bloodline chakra.

skills.name: Demon Insight
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Zabuza (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Hydrification Technique
skills.description: ET Mangetsu steals 20 health points from one enemy. For 1 turn, a random skill class will be chosen, and ET Mangetsu will ignore all enemy skills of that class, or none if no class is chosen.

skills.name: Impure World Regeneration
skills.description: When this skill is used, ET Mangetsu will heal 2 health every turn for the rest of the game. This skill stacks and may only be used 5 times.

skills.name: Mist Sword Summoning
skills.description: Mangetsu randomly summons one of the Seven Swords, granting 'Hydrification Technique' a random unique effect every turn. Hiramekarei: Steals 10 additional health. / Kubikiribocho: Grants 10 permanent destructible defense. / Sameheada: Steals 1 random chakra from the target. / Nuibari: Stuns non-mental skills for 1 turn. / Shibuki: Deals 5 permanent affliction damage. / Kabutowari: Destroys destructible defense and deals 15 piercing damage. / Kiba: Deals 20 affliction damage to all other enemies.

skills.name: Mangetsu Block
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Mangetsu (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Explosive Tag Primer
skills.description: ET Jinpachi gains 10 permanent destructible defense. The next use of 'Silent Explosion' will deal 15 chakra piercing damage* to the target. If an enemy destroys the defense of this skill, they will take 15 piercing damage* and this skill will end.

skills.name: Silent Explosion
skills.description: Jinpachi deals 20 piercing damage to one enemy and reduces their non-affliction damage by 5 for 1 turn. If 'Explosive Tag Primer' is used on the last turn, this skill will cost 1 additional random chakra for 1 turn.

skills.name: Shibuki Explosion Chain
skills.description: ET Jinpachi gains 10 permanent destructible defense. The next use of 'Silent Explosion' will deal 10 permanent affliction damage* to the target. If an enemy destroys the defense of this skill, they will take 10 affliction damage* permanently and this skill will end.

skills.name: Shibuki Defense
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Jinpachi (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Silent Killing Axe
skills.description: ET Jinin deals 20 piercing damage to one enemy and marks them for 2 turns. While marked, they will be unable to reduce damage or become invulnerable. If the target is marked by 'Silent Killing Hammer', it's duration is extended by 1 turn.

skills.name: Silent Killing Hammer
skills.description: ET Jinin deals 20 damage to one enemy, stuns their non-mental skills and markes them for 1 turn. While marked, they will receive 5 additional damage from ET Jinin's skills and will ignore counters and reflects. If the target is marked by 'Silent Killing Axe', it's duration is extended by 1 turn.

skills.name: Axe & Hammer Smash
skills.description: ET Jinin deals 30 damage to one enemy. Before dealing damage, if they are marked by 'Silent Killing Axe', this will destroy destructible defense. If marked by 'Silent Killing Hammer', this will convert any damage reduction into additional non-affliction damage received instead. If marked by both, this deals an additional 10 damage and stuns them for 1 turn.

skills.name: Skilled Evasion
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Jinin (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Silent Dual Sword Rampage
skills.description: Imbuing her swords with lightining, Ameyuri deals 20 piercing damage to one enemy. For 2 turns, that enemy's cooldown will be paralyzed. This effect doesn't stack.

skills.name: Lightning Rain
skills.description: Ameyuri sends bolts of lightning to electrocute her targets, dealing 35 piercing damage to one enemy and 15 to all others. For 1 turn, all enemies will have their skills cooldown increased by 1. This skill deals 10 additional damage to enemies with their cooldowns paralyzed.

skills.name: Lightning Flow Trap
skills.description: Ameyuri surrounds each of her enemies with lightning. For 1 turns, all enemies will have their cooldowns increased by 1 and any enemy that does not use a new skill will receive 10 additional damage from Ameyuri's skills for 1 turn. This skill will last 1 additional turn permanently.

skills.name: Ameyuri Block
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Ameyuri (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Hair Needle Senbon
skills.description: ET Fuguki deals 20 piercing damage to one enemy. For 1 turn, any enemy that uses a new skill on ET Fuguki or his allies will gain a stack of 'Hair Spikes'; This skill may only grant 1 stack to an enemy per turn.

skills.name: Hardened Spikes
skills.description: ET Fuguki instantly applies a stack of 'Hair Spikes' to the enemy team, and his team gains 15 points of destructible defense for 2 turns. During this time, any enemy that destroys this destructible defense will gain a stack of 'Hair Spikes'.

skills.name: Ranged Supression
skills.description: For 3 turns, one enemy will be dealt 5 piercing damage, granting them a stack of 'Hair Spikes' each turn, and the other enemies will be dealt 5 piercing damage every turn. During this time, any enemy that uses a new harmful skill will gain a stack of 'Hair Spikes'. This skill ends if Fuguki dies.

skills.name: Spiked Hair Defense
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Fuguki (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Hair Spikes
skills.description: An enemy affected by this skill will be dealt 2 piercing damage every turn for the rest of the game. During this time, that enemy will receive 5 additional damage from 'Hair Needle Senbon'. This skill stacks.

skills.name: White Secret Technique Ten Puppets
skills.description: Chiyo assaults her enemies using the ten puppets, stunning one enemy's physical and ranged skills for 1 turn. Afterwards, one random enemy will be dealt 20 damage for 2 turns.

skills.name: Possum
skills.description: Chiyo plays possum on one enemy and targets them. For 1 turn, if that enemy uses a new harmful skill, they will be countered. If successfully, that enemy will be dealt 20 damage and will have their physical and melee skills stunned for 1 turn. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: White Secret Art Illusion
skills.description: Edo Tensei Chiyo (S) targets one enemy dealing 25 damage to them. For 1 turn, Edo Tensei Chiyo (S) will ignore harmful non-ranged skills.

skills.name: Chiyo Evade
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Chiyo (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Poison Sickle
skills.description: Hanzo deals 10 physical damage and 10 affliction damage to one enemy. For 1 turn, if that enemy uses a new harmful skill, they take 10 damage.

skills.name: Salamander Swallow
skills.description: Hanzo targets one enemy for 1 turn. The next harmful non-mental skill used by that enemy will have its non-damaged effects not applied and the duration of the skill reduced by 1 turn. If triggered, the target takes 20 affliction damage. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Venom Sac
skills.description: For 1 turn, Hanzo gains 50% unpierceable damage reduction and ignores affliction damage. During this time, any enemy that uses a new skill on him will be *dealt 5 affliction damage for 3 turns. This skill is invisible until first triggered.

skills.name: Ibuse Guard
skills.description: This skill makes Hanzo invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Passive: Contaminated Battlefield
skills.description: At the start of the game, the battlefield becomes Toxic for all characters until Hanzo dies. While Toxic is active: Healing effects and destructible defense will be ignored by all characters. Any character that becomes invulnerable takes 3 permanent affliction damage. This passive cannot be ignored

skills.name: Human Path
skills.description: Nagato draws out the lifeforce of an enemy, stealing 10 health and dealing 20 damage. That enemy's offensive skills will be stunned for 1 turn.

skills.name: Preta Path
skills.description: Nagato drains an enemy's energy, stealing 10 health points and removing 1 taijutsu or ninjutsu from their chakra pool.

skills.name: Animal Path
skills.description: Nagato summons various animals and creatures, dealing 10 damage to all enemies for 2 turns. The following 2 turns, any enemy that uses a new a skill on Edo Tensei Nagato will be *dealt 10 piercing damage.

skills.name: Naraka Path
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Nagato (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Four Finger Nukite
skills.description: Edo Tensei Sandaime Raikage (S) uses Four Finger Nukite on one enemy dealing 25 piercing damage*. Edo Tensei Sandaime Raikage (S) gains 25% damage reduction permanently when this skill is used. This skill becomes 'Three Finger Nukite' permanently when used.

skills.name: Lightning Release Shockwave
skills.description: Using Lightning Release Shockwave Edo Tensei Sandaime Raikage (S) targets one enemy dealing 30 damage. One random enemy will be dealt 30 damage that ignores invulnerability.

skills.name: One Finger Nukite Spear
skills.description: Edo Tensei Sandaime Raikage (S) uses One Finger Nukite Spear on one enemy dealing 50 piercing damage. This skill cannot be countered or reflected.

skills.name: Immense Speed
skills.description: This skill makes ET Sandaime Raikage (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Three Finger Nukite
skills.description: Using Three Finger Nukite Edo Tensei Sandaime Raikage (S) gains 50% damage reduction permanently. 'One Finger Nukite' can be used on all enemies permanently when this skill is used. This skill can only be used once and cannot be removed.

skills.name: Fission
skills.description: ET Muu grant himself or one ally 50% of unpierceable damage reduction points for 1 turn. During this turn, any enemy that uses a new skill on that ally will receive 5 additional damage from non-affliction skills permanently. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Atomic Detachment
skills.description: ET Muu deals 20 damage to one enemy and an additional 15 piercing damage the first turn and 10 piercing damage the following turn. During this time, that enemy's skills will cost 1 additional random chakra. This skill ends if that enemy uses a new skill.

skills.name: Chameleon Covering
skills.description: ET Muu makes himself or one ally ignore all harmful effects except damage for 1 turn. If the protected character receive a new harmful skill, 'Atomic Detachment' will cost 2 random chakra for 1 turn. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Sensorial Awareness
skills.description: This skill makes ET Muu (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Major Summoning: Giant Clam
skills.description: Gengetsu summons a huge clam that exudes illsory mist, granting his team 30 points of destructible defense for 3 turns. Each turn, a random member of his team becoms a mirage, ignoring the first harmful skill used on them for 1 turn; The target is invisible. This skill ends if Gengetsu is killed.

skills.name: Hozuki Water Gun
skills.description: Gengetsu fires a drop of water like a bullet at one enemy, dealing 20 piercing damage to them. If that enemy's health drops to 10 or less, they will be killed. During 'Major Summoning: Giant Clam', this skill will deal 5 additional damage and wll kill enemy if they health drop 15 or less.

skills.name: Steam Imp
skills.description: For 1 turn, Gengetsu makes his team ignore all stun effects. If targetable, all enemies will be dealt 10 affliction damage. During 'Major Summoning: Giant Clam', this skill will last 1 additional turn.

skills.name: Genjutsu Defense
skills.description: This skill makes ET Nidaime Mizukage (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Mirage
skills.description: While 'Major Summoning: Giant Clam' is active, this skill will be applied to a random member of Gengetsu's team. For 1 turn, the target will ignore the first harmful skill used on them. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Itachi Mangekyou Sharingan
skills.description: Itachi becomes invulnerable, enhancing 'Mastered Amaterasu' and 'Mastered Tsukuyomi', increasing their cooldowns by 2 and doubling their costs, and also enabling 'Izanami' to be used. Itachi will take 15 affliction damage* each turn, ignore healing, and may use this skill again for no cost to cancel it.

skills.name: Mastered Amaterasu
skills.description: Itachi burns one enemy with his flames, dealing 15 affliction damage to them and each following turn, they will receive 5 affliction damage a turn. This skill does not stack. During 'Itachi Mangekyou Sharingan', this skill will target all enemies and deal double damage. This skill will end if Itachi dies.

skills.name: Mastered Tsukuyomi
skills.description: Itachi mentally tortures one enemy for 3 days and nights in a matter of seconds, dealing 20 damage to them and stunning them for 1 turn. During 'Itachi Mangekyou Sharingan', this skill will last 3 turns.

skills.name: Edo Tensei Susanoo
skills.description: Using his Susanoo, Itachi becomes invulnerable for 1 turn, and gains 10 destructible defense for each 20 health he has lost. While Itachi has this defense, this skill becomes 'Itachi Susanoo: Yasaka Magatama'. This skill ends during 'Itachi Mangekyou Sharingan' and becomes 'Izanami'.

skills.name: Itachi Susanoo: Yasaka Magatama
skills.description: Itachi unleashes his strongest long-range technique, dealing piercing damage to an enemy equal to the current amount of destructible defense that 'Edo Tensei Susanoo' currently has. Afterwards, 'Edo Tensei Susanoo' will be removed.

skills.name: Izanami
skills.description: Itachi puts an enemy into a mental loop for 3 turns. Each time that enemy uses a new skill, they will be countered, and if that enemy does not use a new skill, 'Izanami' duration will be extended by 1 turn. This skill cannot be removed, countered or reflected and may affect uncounterable skills.

skills.name: Weather Manipulation Rain: Water Wave
skills.description: Yota cries, and a sudden wave crashes down on a random enemy, dealing 15 damage to them, and after targets 0 random enemies, dealing 15 damage to each one of them. This skill will target 1 additional random enemy for each 'Rain Stack' that Yota has. Afterwards, Yota gains 1 'Rain Stack'.

skills.name: Weather Manipulation Rain: Water Spheres
skills.description: Yota gains 15 points of damage reduction* and deals 10 damage to all enemies for 2 turns. Each turn, Yota cries and gains 1 'Rain Stack'. During this time, If Yota is stunned, he will cry even more, gaining 1 additional 'Rain Stack' and healing 10 health.

skills.name: Wather Manipulation Lightning
skills.description: Yota sends a devastating lightning strike to obliterate all enemies, dealing 10 affliction damage to them for each 'Rain Stack' Yota currently has.

skills.name: Yota is happy dont bother him
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Yota (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Rain Stack
skills.description: Each time Yota cries, he intensifies the rain on the battlefield, gaining 1 Rain Stack and enhancing her skills.

skills.name: Snake Coil
skills.description: Kabuto uses his snake to coil around an enemy's body, dealing 10 affliction damage to them permanently. During this time, if that enemy uses a new harmful skill, Kabuto will heal 10 health. This skill stacks but will end if used on a different enemy or if Kabuto is killed.

skills.name: Edo Tensei Technique
skills.description: Kabuto deals 25 affliction damage to one enemy and stuns their harmful skills for 1 turn. If that enemy is killed in this turn, they will become an Edo Tensei and will replace one of Kabuto's allies if they die or if they are currently dead, returning them to 35 health. This effect triggers once per game.

skills.name: Edo Tensei Summoning: Akatsuki
skills.description: Kabuto gains 60 points of destructible defense, and replaces his skills by the alternate version until it is destroyed.

skills.name: White Snake Awakening
skills.description: This skill makes White Snake Kabuto (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Edo Tensei: Clay Clone
skills.description: Kabuto targets one enemy for 1 turn. If that enemy uses a new harmful skill, they will be countered and will be dealt 20 piercing damage. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Edo Tensei: Totsuka Blade
skills.description: Kabuto deals 20 piercing damage to one enemy and removes 1 bloodline or genjutsu from them.

skills.name: Edo Tensei: Flame Mask
skills.description: Kabuto deals 20 affliction damage to one enemy and stuns their helpful skills for 1 turn.

skills.name: Edo Tensei: Human Path
skills.description: Kabuto steals 20 health from one enemy and stuns their harmful skills for 1 turn.

skills.name: Majestic Sting
skills.description: Fuu deals 15 damage to one enemy. The following turn, that enemy will receive 10 additional damage from Fuu's skills.

skills.name: Nanabi: Flying Assault
skills.description: Fuu becomes invulnerable for 1 turn and deals 30 damage to one enemy ignoring invulnerability.

skills.name: Scale Powder Blinding Attack
skills.description: Fuu deals 10 piercing damage to one enemy and makes them unable to reduce damage or become invulnerable for 1 turn. The following turn, that enemy will take another 10 damage and will be stunned for 1 turn.

skills.name: Fuu: Rinnegan Awareness
skills.description: This skill may be used to cast the last skill used by Fuu, costing random chakra and dealing 5 additional damage. Afterwards, the original version of the casted skill will be unable to be used by Fuu for 1 turn.

skills.name: Cat Claws
skills.description: Yugito deals 15 damage to one enemy and stuns their non-mental skills for 1 turn.

skills.name: Fiery Mouse Hairball
skills.description: Yugito deals 15 damage to one enemy and removes 1 taijutsu chakra from them.

skills.name: Nibi: Rage Punch
skills.description: Yugito destroys all destructible defense of one enemy, deals 15 piercing damage to them and kills them if their health drops to 10 or less.

skills.name: Yugito: Rinnegan Awareness
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Yugito (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Passive: Nibi Awakening
skills.description: Every time Yugito uses a new harmful skill, she gains 10 additional damage, stacking until she stops using new harmful skills. If Yugito passes 2 turns without using a new harmful skill, her skills will cost 1 random chakra for 1 turn. The bonus damage may only stack up to a maximum of 30.
